calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Date For Petitioner Dhillon Law Group Inc.S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Against Respondents Infofree.Com, Llc And Vinod Gupta
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DHILLON LAW GROUP, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Against Respondents Infofree.Com, Llc And Vinod Gupta.

Dhillon Law Group, Inc's petition to confirm arbitration award is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal filed on April 4, 2018.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano , CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing Date For Petitioner Dhillon Law Group Inc.S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Against Respondents Infofree.Com, Llc And Vinod Gupta
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Continued To May-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory Michael, Esq. of Dhillon Law Group Inc., T:415.433.1700, for petitioner/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Counsel represented to the Court that the case has settled and requested that the hearing be continued for the parties to complete the settlement. Therefore, the Court holds its tentative ruling in abeyance and,

PETITIONER DHILLON LAW GROUP, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Against Respondents Infofree.Com, LLC And Vinod Gupta is continued to May 4, 2018 at 9:30 am in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
